Think you're pregnant? | SF.gov
Skip to main content
INFO PAGE
Think you're pregnant?
You can get a free pregnancy test by contacting any of the clinics below
Department of Public Health
Visit or call a clinic now and ask for a free pregnancy test!
Chinatown Public Health Center
, 415-364-7600,1490 Mason Street, 94133, Services in English, Cantonese, Mandarin, Vietnamese
Family Health Center at Zuckerberg SF General Hospital
, 415-206-5252, 995 Potrero Avenue, 94110, Services in English, Spanish, Cantonese, Mandarin, Arabic, Vietnamese

, 415-641-69961580 Valencia Street #508, 94110, Services in English, Spanish, Russian
Most clinics have interpreter services and patient care in all languages. Call 1-800-300-9950 for any questions about where to get health care. These services are paid for by Presumptive Eligibility which is a short term Medi-Cal program for women and teens who think they may be pregnant or are pregnant. If you are not pregnant and would like family planning services you can sign up for Family PACT at any of the clinics.
